programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A promiscuous magazine writer starts to fall in love with the subject of her latest article.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: God (Morgan Freeman) commands a newly elected congressman (Steve Carell) to build an ark.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs offers Dom and his crew a full pardon if they help him nab a team of mercenary drivers.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: A government agent offers to help Dominic Toretto's gang eliminate a dangerous enemy.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: Framed for murder, a convict (Jason Statham) must compete in a brutal auto race to win his freedom.

programme.title: Death Race 2
programme.desc: A prisoner (Luke Goss) competes in a brutal race where cars are deadly weapons.

programme.title: Death Race 3: Inferno
programme.desc: A legendary driver (Luke Goss) enters the first Death Race to take place in the Kalahari Desert.

programme.title: Death Race: Beyond Anarchy
programme.desc: A black ops specialist infiltrates a prison to take down a legendary driver in a brutal car race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs offers Dom and his crew a full pardon if they help him nab a team of mercenary drivers.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: A government agent offers to help Dominic Toretto's gang eliminate a dangerous enemy.

programme.desc: Framed for murder, a convict (Jason Statham) must compete in a brutal auto race to win his freedom.

programme.title: Death Race 2
programme.desc: A prisoner (Luke Goss) competes in a brutal race where cars are deadly weapons.

programme.title: Death Race 3: Inferno

programme.title: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: New York architect (Wesley Snipes) and woman (Annabella Sciorra) make waves with biracial affair.

programme.title: Queen & Slim
programme.desc: A couple go on the run after one shoots a police officer in self-defense during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: An inexperienced college student begins a daring affair with a controlling businessman.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Shadowy figures from Christian Grey's past threaten his rekindled romance with Anastasia Steele.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Sinister events threaten the bliss between billionaire Christian Grey and his new wife, Anastasia.

programme.desc: New York architect (Wesley Snipes) and woman (Annabella Sciorra) make waves with biracial affair.
